calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-02-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Catherine Yee and Warren Woo for Charles Tsou.

Mr. Woo stated that they are not aware of any opposition. The Court stated that it has no problem with Mr. Woo's request for extraordinary fees with respect to the litigation, but it has concerns with the extraordinary fees for Ms. Yee with respect to administration. The Court also noted that there are no time records to show that the statutory fee isn't sufficient to cover all of the work that was done and whether any of the work performed was extraordinary. Ms. Yee stated that her office does not usually keep records of their statutory time, that she doesn't usually need to review purchase agreements or prepare for confirmation of sale, and that it would take a considerable amount of time to reconstruct her time. The Court granted the First and Final Report on Waiver of Accounting, etc. except for and as to the request for extraordinary fees for the Administrator's Attorney (subject to the Court revising the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-11-2018 Continued To Sep-25-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1118 Noriega Street, San Francisco, Ca 94122-4516)
Off Calendar Apr-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Catherine Yee and Warren Woo for and with Charles Tsou.

The Estate owns 50% of the property. The sale is for 100% of the property. The sale was confirmed at $1,428,800.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed March 1, 2018. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $215,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For Approval And Authority To Compromise Grace Tsous Petition For: (1) Declaration Of Community Property Interest In Real Property And Or (2) Reimbursement
Off Calendar Jul-31-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Warren Woo for Charles Tsou (Administrator).
Gener Benitez for Grace Tsou.

The Court noted that it read the petition and the terms of the settlement. Mr. Woo and Mr. Benitez stated that they had nothing to add. The Court granted the Petition for (1) Approval and Authority to Compromise Grace Tsou's Petition for Declaration of Community Property Interest in Real Property and or (2) Reimbursement (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For: (1) Declaration Of Grace Tsous Community Interest In Real Property [Probate Code Sections 850(A)(2)(C); 13650(A)]; And Or Reimbursement
Off Calendar Jul-19-2017 Continued To Aug-02-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For: (1) Declaration Of Grace Tsous Community Interest In Real Property [Probate Code Sections 850(A)(2)(C); 13650(A)]; And Or Reimbursement
Off Calendar Jul-05-2017 Continued To Jul-19-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For: (1) Declaration Of Grace Tsous Community Interest In Real Property [Probate Code Sections 850(A)(2)(C); 13650(A)]; And Or Reimbursement
Off Calendar Mar-29-2017 Continued To Jul-05-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gener Benitez for and with Grace Tsou (Petitioner).
Warren Woo for Charles Tsou (Executor).
John Hui also present.

Mr. Woo stated that they have exchanged information since the last hearing, that the property is occupied by the Spouse, that they have been talking about a buy out but have not agreed on an amount, and that he believes the only asset is the interest in the property. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than June 23, 2017. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by June 28, 2017. The Petition for Declaration of Grace Tsou's Community Interest in Real Property and or Reimbursement is continued to and the Parties are to return on July 5, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. A copy of the mediation order was provided to Counsel in open Court.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
